book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called la tasca
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 2 people at 17:30 on sunday
If the booking fails how about 16:30
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should be in the north
The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the moderate price range
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 5 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
